param.value: {Benefits=Competitive salary, insurance, AI focused research exposure, flexible work support, and long term career growth in intelligent systems engineering., Category=Information Technology, City / State=Bengaluru, Karnataka, Country=India, Currency 1=INR(₹), Currency 2=INR(₹), Currency 3=INR(₹), Department / Division=Artificial Intelligence and Autonomy, Employment Type=Full Time, Expected Hiring Date=18-08-2026, Expiry Date=26-06-2026, Job Description=We are hiring an AI and Autonomy Engineer to support intelligent decision making, mission automation, autonomous navigation behavior, and advanced UAV control logic through AI driven approaches., Job Posting Name=AI and Autonomy Engineer Hiring 01, Job Requirements=Experience in AI systems, autonomy concepts, machine learning integration, decision logic, and intelligent control workflows. Exposure to robotics or autonomous systems is strongly preferred., Job Title=AI and Autonomy Engineer, Job Urgency=High, Number of Positions=1, Remote=Yes, Required Education=M.Tech, Required Experience=Senior, Salary From 1=1800000, Salary From 2=2400001, Salary From 3=3200001, Salary To 1=2400000, Salary To 2=3200000, Salary To 3=4000000, Save As Job Posting Template=No, Screening Question 1=Do you have experience in AI systems, autonomy workflows, or machine learning integration in real world products?, Screening Question 2=Have you worked on intelligent control, mission automation, or decision making logic for autonomous systems?, Screening Question 3=Which AI or machine learning tools, frameworks, or deployment approaches have you used in your projects?, Select Template=Custom Template, Unit 1=Yearly, Unit 2=Yearly, Unit 3=Yearly, When Positions Fulfilled=Enable Waitlist}

exception.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: (//*[contains(@class,'rc-virtual-list-holder')])[15]' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
